ip_outcome_note: Species name printed on card face; PokemonTCG.io API (swsh3-55) confirms name=Mareep, nationalPokedexNumbers=[179], Basic. Depicted small fluffy yellow wool sheep-like creature in a sunny grassy field matches canonical Mareep appearance exactly.

trivia_bullets.text: This is a second inventory print of Mareep, distinct from the Chilling Reign (CRE-047) print trivia'd in wave 20. DAA-055 (Darkness Ablaze, August 14, 2020) predates CRE-047 (Chilling Reign, June 18, 2021) by approximately ten months — it is the earlier of the two SwSh-block Mareep prints in this inventory. [PokemonTCG.io API: swsh3-55; swsh6-47]

DAA-055 is illustrated by sowsow; CRE-047 is illustrated by Miki Tanaka. The two prints show meaningfully different art registers for the same species: sowsow's DAA version places Mareep in a forest/day setting with warm golden and green tones; Miki Tanaka's CRE version is a spring meadow with scattered white wildflowers and a clear sky horizon. Different illustrators, different seasons, same flavor text printed verbatim on both cards. [PokemonTCG.io API: swsh3-55 artist; swsh6-47 artist]

DAA-055 has a single attack: Static Shock (Lightning) 20. CRE-047 has two attacks: Growl (reduces opponent's damage by 20) and Static Shock (LightningColorless) 20 — a materially different attack layout despite sharing the species name and flavor text. The CRE version's extra Growl attack gives it more tactical utility as a stall/buffer piece in evolution-line builds. [PokemonTCG.io API: swsh3-55; swsh6-47 attacks]

Flavor text: "Rubbing its fleece generates electricity. You'll want to pet it because it's cute, but if you use your bare hand, you'll get a painful shock." — printed on DAA-055. Same text appears verbatim on CRE-047, which is consistent with the TCG's practice of cycling established Pokedex-derived flavor text across reprints of common species. [PokemonTCG.io API: swsh3-55; swsh6-47]
